name: Intro: Hello World
description: A simple pipeline demonstrating the basics of Tangle.

name: Intro: Input and Output Nodes
description: A pipeline demonstrating input and output nodes in Tangle. Includes data ingestion, processing, and export steps.

name: Intro: Subgraphs
description: A pipeline demonstrating the use of subgraphs in Tangle. Includes modular components and reusable workflows.

name: Intro: Data Flow
description: A pipeline to get familiar with data flow in Tangle. Includes basic data processing and model training steps.

name: Intro: Secrets
description: A pipeline to get familiar with managing secrets in Tangle.

name: Intro: Multi-Node Pipelines
description: A pipeline demonstrating a multinodal setup in Tangle.

name: XGBoost Sample Pipeline
description: Train and evaluate an XGBoost model with feature preprocessing and hyperparameter tuning. Demonstrates a complete ML workflow from data loading to model evaluation.

name: PyTorch Network
description: Build and train a fully-connected neural network using PyTorch. Includes data loading, model architecture definition, training loop, and evaluation metrics.

name: Vertex AI AutoML Tables
description: Leverage Google Cloud's Vertex AI AutoML to automatically build and deploy tabular models. No coding required for model training.

name: TFX Pipeline
description: Production-ready TensorFlow Extended (TFX) pipeline for end-to-end ML workflows. Includes data validation, transformation, training, and model serving.
